introSection: Achterbahn is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Flippolino in Germany. It opened in April 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single downward helix.

fullText:
Achterbahn is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Flippolino in Germany. It opened in April 2018.

The ride has a single downward helix.
